question: What technologies do you work with?
answer: We work with React, Next.js, Node.js, Flutter, React Native, Laravel, Python, and more — always choosing the best stack for your project's specific needs and scale.

question: How long does a typical project take?
answer: Project timelines vary based on scope. A standard web app typically takes 6–12 weeks, while larger platforms can take 3–6 months. We provide a detailed timeline after our discovery session.

question: Do you work with international clients?
answer: Yes. We are time-zone aligned and work with clients globally. Our team is comfortable with both async and real-time communication across regions and time zones.

question: Do you provide post-launch support?
answer: Absolutely. We offer proactive post-launch support and maintenance packages to keep your product running smoothly, securely, and up-to-date after launch.

question: What industries do you serve?
answer: We have deep expertise across FinTech, Healthcare, Edutech, HVAC, Legal, HRM, ERP, Travel, eCommerce, AI Chatbots, Telecommunications, Workflow Management, and more.

question: Can I see examples of your previous work?
answer: Yes — visit our Portfolio page to see case studies from Al Sabah HVAC, NCAMadeEasy, SpiceMagic, St. Mary's Construction, and more.
